use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn walk_with_policy(root: &str, include_hidden: bool, include_gitignored: bool) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut builder = WalkDir::new(root);
    if include_hidden {
        builder = builder.hidden(false);
    }
    if include_gitignored {
        builder = builder.git_ignore(false).git_exclude(false);
    }
    builder
        .into_iter()
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .map(|e| e.path().to_string_lossy().to_string())
        .collect()
}
